commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=bdfe96b705ccca89e84ce41d47e4d526a0fbc23c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR moves the CI lint job from `macos-15-intel` to `ubuntu-latest` and updates the lint tool installer for Linux x86_64 checksums and SwiftFormat binary naming.

Reproducibility: yes. The exact PR CI lint job on Ubuntu fails with `spawnSync plutil ENOENT`, and source inspection shows the path from `.github/workflows/ci.yml` through `Scripts/lint.sh` to `Scripts/check-app-locales.mjs`.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer follow-up is needed because exact PR CI proves the new Ubuntu lint job fails, and insufficient real behavior proof keeps this human-only rather than a repair-lane candidate.

target.title: ci: run lint on Linux runners
target.body:
## Summary

- run the CI `lint` job on `ubuntu-latest` instead of `macos-15-intel`
- remove the Xcode/toolchain setup from lint because the lint script uses shell/node checks plus portable SwiftFormat/SwiftLint binaries
- pin SHA256 checksums for the Linux x86_64 SwiftFormat and SwiftLint archives used by the Ubuntu lint job

## Rationale

The macOS test sharding reduced individual test lane time, but each PR now asks for multiple macOS runner slots. Keeping lint on macOS adds another slot request and can leave PRs waiting even after all test shards have completed.

Moving lint to Ubuntu preserves the independent lint signal while reducing macOS runner pressure. The aggregate `lint-build-test` gate still depends on both lint and the macOS shard matrix, so branch protection keeps one stable gate without rerunning tests.

## Validation

- `ruby -e "require 'yaml'; YAML.load_file('.github/workflows/ci.yml'); puts 'yaml ok'"`
- `bash -n Scripts/install_lint_tools.sh`
- `bash Scripts/test_swift_test_sharding.sh`
- `git diff --check`
- Downloaded the pinned Linux x86_64 archives and verified:
  - SwiftFormat 0.59.1: `150d9693570cf234ec91d8a03ba7165bd36a78335c5e40ed91e4c013a492eb54`
  - SwiftLint 0.63.2: `dd1017cfd20a1457f264590bcb5875a6ee06cd75b9a9d4f77cd43a552499143b`
target.author: yuxin-qiao

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
